name: Perfect Shot Golf Indoor Golf Suite
about: Perfect Shot Golf is an indoor golf simulator suite powered by Full Swing technology. It provides a safe environment for golfers of all ages and abilities to improve their game through a virtual indoor driving range and the ability to play virtual golf courses. The venue's state-of-the-art system tracks over 10 aspects of the golf swing, including total carry, distance, ball direction, club path, back spin, and side spin. Located inside South Pas Fitness in South Pasadena, CA, it offers a convenient practice facility for golfers looking to refine their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Full Swing technology providing extensive swing data analysis
Access to renowned virtual courses like Pebble Beach and TPC Sawgrass
Safe, indoor environment for year-round practice and play

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or beverage service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade simulator system used by PGA pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clean clubs, or rent them on-site. Golf balls are provided, but you can use your own if they are clean without sharpie marks.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or beverage service is mentioned. The venue does not appear to allow outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time is mentioned for playing 18 holes, though the venue offers flexible hourly sessions for 1-5 players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Perfect Shot Golf welcomes golfers of all ages and abilities, including children. The FAQ section confirms that kids can use the simulator.
